name: Wildflower Collective
description: A rustic, boho-inspired floral studio based in southern New Hampshire. Wildflower Collective specializes in loose, organic arrangements using locally grown and foraged blooms. Budget-friendly and perfect for barn weddings, outdoor celebrations, and free-spirited couples.

includes: bulk flowers and greenery delivered day-before
diy_hybrid.note: For couples who want to arrange their own flowers with our guidance and materials.

personal_flowers.note: Bouquets and wearable flowers for the wedding party — we love pets at weddings and are happy to create floral collars for your furry family members

ceremony_decor.note: Floral installations and decor for the ceremony space

reception_decor.note: Table florals, garlands, and decorative arrangements for the reception

extras.note: The flower bar is a popular cocktail hour activity where guests create their own mini arrangements

seasonal_availability_notes: Heavily seasonal and locally sourced. Summer and early fall offer the widest selection. Winter weddings use more dried elements and greenery.

eco_friendly.donation_partner: Local nursing homes and hospice centers
eco_friendly.note: Sustainability is in our DNA. All flowers are locally grown or foraged. Zero floral foam. All materials are compostable. We donate or compost everything after the event.

consultation_process.note: Free consultation — we'll meet you at the venue or over video chat. We love brainstorming creative ideas together.

deposit_and_cancellation.note: We're small and flexible. If plans change, talk to us — we'll try to work something out.

highlights: DIY package saved us so much

sweeteners: Free wildflower seed packets as wedding favors (up to 100)
Complimentary greenery garland for the head table
Free flower bar activity station for cocktail hour with orders over $2000
Complimentary dried bouquet preservation for the bride
personality: Warm, earthy, and very flexible. Wildflower Collective is run by a small team that genuinely loves what they do. They are the most budget-friendly florist in the area and will work creatively within almost any price range. They love nontraditional weddings and are happy to forage custom elements for a personal touch.
